adapter_name.title: Name
adapter_name.description: Provide a unique name for this adapter instance. Example: minimax-1

model.title: Model
model.description: MiniMax-M3 supports a 1,000,000-token context window and multimodal input. MiniMax-M2.7 supports a 204,800-token context window and text input.

api_base.title: API Base
api_base.description: MiniMax OpenAI-compatible endpoint. The default is for global accounts; use https://api.minimaxi.com/v1 for China accounts.

max_tokens.title: Maximum Output Tokens
max_tokens.description: Maximum number of output tokens to limit LLM replies. Leave it empty to use the provider default.

max_retries.title: Max Retries
max_retries.description: The maximum number of times to retry a request if it fails.

enable_thinking.title: Enable Thinking
enable_thinking.description: Enable adaptive thinking for MiniMax-M3. MiniMax-M2.7 always keeps thinking enabled.
